meaning: adj.火山的,象火山的,猛烈的,易突然发作的,爆发的n.火山岩
examples: The city was entombed in volcanic lava.
Over 200 people have been killed by volcanic eruptions.
This volcanic archipelago, with its spectacular landscapes, is situated off the coast of the Hebrides.
When Curiosity approached the volcanic rock, there was never really any expectation that it would pique great excitement.
